response.justification: Bogdan has relevant experience as a Staff Software Engineer with exposure to AI-driven development and distributed systems. His background in technical strategy and hands-on coding aligns with the job requirements.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proven ability to work across the stack with multiple technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience with LLM, ML, or AI products
No explicit mention of experience with agile ceremonies or scrum champion role
Some skills like DLang and C# may not be directly relevant to the job

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct LLM/ML/AI product experience
